title: The Sun Always Shines on T.V.
meaning_summary: This song remains durable because of its emotional scale, melodic clarity, and long-tail appeal to synth-pop listeners.
revenue_drivers: Catalog streaming provides the recurring revenue base.
Synth-pop discovery and nostalgia playlists support replay.
Visual-era recognition helps maintain long-tail interest.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: The Sun Always Shines on T.V. is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
